name: check_balance
description: Check the current account balance and available credit.

account_type.description: Type of account to check: 'checking', 'savings', or 'credit'. Default 'checking'.

name: get_transactions
description: Retrieve recent transactions for the account, optionally filtered by date range or amount.

max_results.description: Maximum number of transactions to return. Default 20.

name: transfer_money
description: Transfer money to another account by providing the recipient, amount, and optional memo.

recipient.description: Recipient account identifier (account number or username).

memo.description: Optional memo or note for the transfer.

name: pay_bill
description: Pay a bill to a registered payee.

payee.description: Name or identifier of the payee.

account_number.description: Account or reference number for the bill.

name: update_account_info
description: Update account holder information such as address, phone number, or email.
